name: INNO HOLDINGS INC.
summary: Overview INNO HOLDINGS INC. (INNO, we, us, or Company) is an innovative technology company that engages in the business of recycled consumer electronic devices. We source and purchase pre-owned consumer electronic devices such as smartphones and tablets from suppliers and sell the electronic devices to wholesalers that re-sell these products to their wholesale and/or retail customers in Southeast Asia, Middle East Asia, Europe and other regions.
